base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of poison_roxy — a character from 1989 final fight. Poison + Roxy — pink/white palette-variants. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Poison + Roxy — pink/white palette-variants; controversial female enemies (Japanese version has them male)
